public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as canon-keeper.
appearance: Ritual garments, symbolic tokens, and carefully maintained devotional detail make the role legible at a glance.
manner: Carries devotional seriousness shaped by rite, memory, and public expectation. In Mimolot, that reads as someone scholarly, proprietary, and intellectually guarded, weighing knowledge against access and control, and the habits of a canon-keeper still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of canon-keeper in and around Mimolot Academy, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Mimolot Academy workable through the obligations of canon-keeper while managing the immediate pressure of tariff tensions in Mimolot.
hidden_pressure: Must hold ritual legitimacy, public comfort, and doctrinal integrity together without letting strain become visible too early. Around Mimolot Academy, that usually means carrying tariff tensions, book tariff and magical conduct, institutional scrutiny without letting the role of canon-keeper visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Vessa Scriptmere needs discreet aid to prevent a ritual lapse, desecration, or public crisis of trust around Mimolot Academy.
Vessa Scriptmere may ask the party to retrieve someone, something, or some truth before a rite can proceed safely.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. Appearance extended under V28_8 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
public_signal: Ritual dress, offering marks, and devotional cadence make Vessa Scriptmere immediately legible as a spiritual intermediary. In Mimolot Academy, this lands inside a public field already shaped by House Mimolot.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Mimolot Academy: shrines, cathedrals, funerary halls, or ritual precincts
